## Summary

Describe the change in 2-4 sentences, focusing on user-visible behavior or repo impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `./.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/`
- [ ] `./.venv/bin/python scripts/check_scaffold.py`
- [ ] Relevant docs were updated when behavior or workflow changed
- [ ] New behavior has tests or a clear reason why tests were not added

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private data were added
- [ ] No unrelated generated artifacts were intentionally bundled without explanation
- [ ] Licensing implications were reviewed if this changes distribution, reuse, or commercialization surfaces
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes were reviewed against `SECURITY.md`

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out any risky areas, follow-up work, or intentionally deferred cleanup.
